title: Blood Arsenal Reawakened
description: Blood Arsenal Reawakened – A modern rework of the popular Blood Arsenal addon for Blood Magic
body:
📖 About

Blood Arsenal Reawakened is a continuation and modernization of the original Blood Arsenal mod by Arcaratus.

This mod expands and enhances the **Blood Magic** experience with new content, tools, sigils, and improvements.

    🔹 Designed for Minecraft 1.16.5  
    🔹 Built for Blood Magic 3.0.0  
    🔹 Created and maintained by DeadlyHunter  
    🔹 Future updates planned for newer Minecraft versions

    Note: English is not my first language. If something is unclear or contains mistakes, feel free to reach out!

✨ Features

    ✔️ Compatible with Blood Magic 3.0.0 and Minecraft 1.16.5
    🧪 New items and sigils
    🐛 Bug fixes and performance improvements
    📦 Full support for JEI (Just Enough Items)
    🛠️ Improved recipes and balancing
    🔧 Many smaller enhancements and optimizations

📦 Installation

    1. Install **Minecraft Forge** (recommended: 1.16.5-36.2.34 or later)  
    2. Install **Blood Magic** (version 3.0.0 or newer)  
    3. Download and place the *Blood Arsenal Reawakened* `.jar` file into your `mods` folder  
    4. Launch Minecraft using the Forge profile

💬 Support & Feedback

If you have questions, found a bug, or want to suggest a feature:

    🧪 GitHub: github.com/DeadlyHunt3r/Blood-Arsenal-Reawakened
    💬 Discord: coming soon

📜 License

    This mod is based on Blood Arsenal by Arcaratus, licensed under the Creative Commons      
    Attribution 4.0 International License.
    All additions and changes by DeadlyHunter are licensed under the same license.

🙏 Thanks To

    Arcaratus for the original Blood Arsenal
    Way of Time for Blood Magic
    The community – for feedback and support!
